title: agropyron junceum subsp. obtusiflorum
intro: Agropyron junceum subsp. obtusiflorum, also known as Obtuse-Flowered Junegrass, is a subspecies of the Agropyron junceum plant, a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Agropyron junceum subsp. obtusiflorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and stems of the plant and steeping them in hot water or a solvent.
